windows.embed_text_v2: Styling wedding reception tablescape with green succulent centerpieces in stone bowl and glass terrarium vases, small lit votive tealight candles, white linen place settings, event candle decor
windows.summary_v2: Decor montage of green succulent centerpieces in stone bowls and glass terrariums on elegantly set wedding reception tables accented with small lit votive candles.

tags_v2.action: styling succulent centerpieces with votive candles on event tables

seconds_v2.desc: Extreme close-up of green rosette succulents and a spiky star cactus planted in dark soil; a small 'Timeless Touch' logo watermark sits in the lower-right corner.
Continued macro of the same fleshy green succulents and cactus in soil, foliage filling the frame, the corner watermark still present.

Wide shot of a round banquet table dressed with white linen, cream napkins, plates, silverware and wine glasses; a low stone bowl of assorted green succulents forms the centerpiece, flanked by small lit votive candles, wooden cross-back chairs around.
Same elegantly set round wedding table with the succulent centerpiece bowl and glowing tealight votives; more draped tables and chairs blur in the background.
Slightly closer view of the white-linen table and its succulent centerpiece, two small votive candles flickering beside the stone bowl among the place settings.
Camera angle shifts on the banquet table, succulent bowl centerpiece centered, lit votive candles and rows of wine glasses and cream napkins arranged around it.
Lower angle across the table showing the tall aloe and rosette succulents in the stone bowl, small glass votive candles lit nearby, cross-back chairs and other tables behind.
Continued view of the succulent centerpiece on the styled wedding table with votive candles, place settings and reception room fading into the background.

New tablescape: clear glass terrarium vases of varying sizes holding succulents, pebbles and white flower stems sit on a wood slab, a small round glass with a tealight candle in front, set on a white-linen table.

windows.embed_text_v2: Showing white peony hydrangea rose centerpieces in crystal vases and glowing glass pillar candle on candlelit wedding table, then DIY mirror-base centerpiece instructional graphic with pillar candles

tags_v2.action: showing floral and candle wedding centerpiece decor with DIY instructions
tags_v2.on_screen_text: Timeless Touch; DIY MIRROR BASE WEDDING CENTERPIECE; Materials; Mirror base: $5-10; Flowers (roses, hydrangeas, peonies): $15-20; Candles or fairy lights: $5-10; Step 1 Place a small mirror as the base of your centerpiece; Step 2 Arrange fresh flowers onto tall vase; Step 3 Add candles or fairy lights around the

seconds_v2.desc: Soft-focus banquet table with cut-crystal vases of white peonies, hydrangeas and baby's breath, a small posy of white roses and clear wine glasses; a 'Timeless Touch' logo watermark sits lower-right.
Same warmly lit white floral centerpieces in faceted glass vases on the dressed table, roses and hydrangeas arranged among the stemware, corner watermark present.
Slight shift across the elegant white flower arrangements in crystal vases, low rose cluster and goblets in the foreground, blurred candlelit reception behind.
Continued view of the lush white peony and hydrangea centerpieces in cut-glass vases on the linen table, soft golden venue lighting.
Closer angle on the crystal vases of white blooms with a small mirrored votive holder and rose posy at the table's edge among the glassware.
Scene transitions to a dim, dreamy tablescape: a tall glass pillar candle glows on a stemmed holder amid green tulip foliage, blurred warm bokeh candlelight filling the background.
Lit glass-encased pillar candle on a tall holder stays centered over the candlelit reception table, additional votives and tulips glowing softly around it.
Continued atmospheric shot of the glowing pillar candle in its glass holder above the tulip-and-candle-lined table, warm light flares and bokeh throughout.

Full-screen instructional graphic 'DIY MIRROR BASE WEDDING CENTERPIECE' listing materials and three captioned steps with photos: a square mirror base, white roses arranged in a tall glass vase, and pillar candles placed around the mirror base; 'Timeless Touch' watermark in corner.

windows.embed_text_v2: finished wedding reception centerpieces; floating tealight candles over submerged white roses in cylinder vases, plus succulent terrarium glass jars with pebbles on banquet tables, decor b-roll not candle making
windows.summary_v2: Promotional wedding-decor montage showing floating-candle rose centerpieces and succulent glass-jar table arrangements, not any candle-making process.

seconds_v2.desc: Dim candlelit reception scene: tall cylinder glass vases hold submerged white roses with floating tealight candles glowing on the water surface, warm bokeh lights behind.
Long banquet table styling shot: white roses, baby's breath, tall taper candles and glassware run down a white-linen table with string-light bokeh in the background.
Same elegant tablescape continues, panning across white floral centerpieces, candlesticks, wine glasses and place settings on the banquet table.
Cut to a daylit round table centerpiece: clustered glass terrarium vases of green succulents and white filler flowers in pebbles on a wood slab, lit tealight beside.
Same succulent terrarium centerpiece, slightly different angle, showing the trio of glass jars with succulents, gravel and a small lit tealight on the set table.
Continued view of the succulent glass-jar centerpiece arrangement with wine glasses and plates around it; small tealight candle burning at the base.
Succulent terrarium centerpiece steady on the wood-slice riser, surrounded by formal place settings; tealight candle still lit in front.
Same daytime banquet table with the green succulent jar centerpiece and lit tealight, glassware and plates framing it.
Final hold on the succulent-filled glass centerpiece cluster with burning tealight, place settings and chiavari chairs around the round table.
